system.description: The reactions of the Angels of Death are far beyond what any normal human could achieve. While Astartes power armour manages not to hinder a Battle-Brother's natural speed, this suit goes to great lengths to enhance and optimise it. The armour's hyper articulated joint mechanisms allow for more dextrous weight manipulation, and muscle-response auto-readers translate even minute movements into powered assistance. These systems grant the bearer a +5 bonus to Agility, and +1 to Initiative rolls.
